cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the text to find the correct answer. The question is asking what the text suggests, and the options are A through D. First, let me read the passage again to understand the key points: Zhao Wenxuan is a film star from Taiwan. He loved films as a child and even watched a movie multiple times. Before becoming an actor, he worked in an airline. He became an actor by chance when he saw an ad for a film called "Wedding Feast" and contacted the director, Li An. This led to his role in the film. He was chosen partly because of his English skills, natural behavior, and lower pay. The film "Wedding Feast" was a big success. It won the German Golden Bear Award and was entered in the Oscar competition. It was the first Taiwan film shown in the US. Because of this film, Zhao became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Southeast Asia. In 1994, he was in "Red Rose and White Rose," which won several awards. He has acted in 13 films since 1993, most highly regarded. He also mentions that Taiwan should cooperate with the mainland in film production and has been to the mainland for filming. Now, let's check the options: (A) "Wedding Feast" is just an ordinary film – The text says the opposite: it was a hit, won awards, entered Oscar, first to be shown in the US. So A is incorrect. (B) The film "Wedding Feast" disappointed people greatly – Again, the text says it was successful, so B is wrong. (C) Zhao Wenxuan became a famous movie star because of the film "Wedding Feast" – The text states that thanks to the film, he became popular in those regions. So C seems correct.
